PROCESS COMPLETED BY DEFAULT SECTION. WRIT MAY ISSUE 12-JUN- 95.
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION HEARING SET FOR SEP-18-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 02

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, CALENDAR OF SEP-18-1995 GRANTED EXCEPT FOR THE SUM OF $50.00 TO BE WITHHELD FROM EACH PAY PERIOD. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE 1/2 EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR AND THE OTHER 1/2 TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.

RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION AS TO DEFENDANT GALDAMEZ, NORMA RUTH

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GALDAMEZ, NORMA RUTH $3,193.12 PRINCIPAL, $2,452.59 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,659.71, RENEWAL OF OLD CASE #899384 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $154.69 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $779.96 INTEREST, $213.00 COSTS, MATURE DATE 11/11/96 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAY EMPLOYEES FEDERAL CREDIT UNION
